description:
Calculate earthwork cut and fill volumes between the existing ground surface (C:\workspace\data\existing_ground.xyz) and the proposed finished grade (C:\workspace\data\proposed_grade.xyz) in TopoCal. Save the project (.tcp) to C:\workspace\data\ and record the results in a plain-text report at C:\workspace\data\earthwork_report.txt using this exact format:
Cut: XXXX.X m3
Fill: XXXX.X m3
Net: XXXX.X m3
